parameters.query:
WITH fire AS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM alarm_config
  WHERE enabled
    AND alarm_time = to_char((now() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Argentina/Cordoba'), 'HH24:MI')
),
hoy AS (
  SELECT artist, album, left(release_date, 4) AS year
  FROM ephemerides
  WHERE month_day = to_char((now() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Argentina/Cordoba'), 'MM-DD')
    AND month_day IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY weight DESC, random()
  LIMIT 4
),
agg AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(
           json_agg(json_build_object('artist', artist, 'album', album, 'year', year)),
           '[]'::json
         ) AS albums
  FROM hoy
)
SELECT agg.albums
FROM agg
WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM fire);
